name: mcp-server-robinhood-chain
description: Robinhood Chain (chain id 4663) on-chain trading intelligence for AI agents — real-time KOL trades from tracked wallets' verified EVM addresses, the full Uniswap v2/v3/v4 DEX trade tape, token discovery with launch-bundle + early-buyer-quality detection, 1-minute OHLC candles, deployer reputation (graduation_rate / runner_rate over 40k+ deployers), and smart-money wallet ranking. EVM-native throughout (0x addresses, eth_amount, tx_hash, net_flow_eth) from our self-hosted RHC node. Free tier 200 requests/day; auth via msk_ API key, bundled into every tier at no extra cost.

tools.name: rhc_kol_feed
tools.description: Real-time Robinhood Chain KOL trade feed — EVM-native (0x, eth_amount, tx_hash).

tools.name: rhc_kol_leaderboard
tools.description: RHC KOLs ranked by trade count then net ETH flow (24h/7d/30d).

tools.name: rhc_kol_hot_tokens
tools.description: RHC consensus tokens — bought by 2+ distinct KOLs in the window.

tools.name: rhc_kol_profile
tools.description: Single RHC KOL profile — stats over last 200 trades + 50 recent.

tools.name: rhc_trades
tools.description: RHC DEX trade tape — Uniswap v2/v3/v4 swaps with trader_eoa + MEV fields. PRO+.

tools.name: rhc_tokens
tools.description: RHC token discovery — MC, liquidity, peak MC, launchpad, deployer tier. PRO+.

tools.name: rhc_token
tools.description: RHC token snapshot — price/MC/FDV, deployer block, KOL activity, pools.

tools.name: rhc_token_candles
tools.description: RHC 1-minute OHLC candles — price + MC OHLC, volume buy/sell split. PRO+.

tools.name: rhc_token_kol_consensus
tools.description: RHC KOL consensus on a token — buyers/sellers, exit rate, net_flow_eth. PRO+.

tools.name: rhc_token_buyer_quality
tools.description: RHC 0–100 early-buyer quality with bundle + dump-cluster legs.

tools.name: rhc_token_bundle
tools.description: RHC launch-bundle detection (same_block) + how much the cohort still holds.

tools.name: rhc_deployer_leaderboard
tools.description: RHC deployers ranked by reputation — graduation_rate ($40K), runner_rate ($100K).

tools.name: rhc_deployer_profile
tools.description: Single RHC deployer profile + 50 most recent tokens.

tools.name: rhc_alpha_wallets
tools.description: RHC smart-money wallets — net_eth, win_rate, memecoin_share, likely_bot. PRO+.
